testcase.name: Successfully register a new user

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.id: terms (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.25.0', revision: '8a8aea2337' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.8.0-110-generic', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 143.0.7499.40, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 143.0.7499.192 (be2c1f4fd45..., userDataDir: /tmp/.org.chromium.Chromium...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:37729}, goog:processID: 969, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:37729/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 143.0.7499.40, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: ff02eae1bd7151b61f882a15f1511605 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at com.xats.automation.tests.pages.auth.SignUpPage.clickButton(SignUpPage.java:64) at com.xats.automation.tests.pages.auth.SignUpPage.acceptTermsAndSubmit(SignUpPage.java:51) at com.xats.automation.tests.stepdefinitions.auth.AuthSteps.acceptTermsAndSubmit(AuthSteps.java:75) at ✽.User accepts the terms and clicks Create Account(file:///runner/_work/automation/automation/src/test/resources/features/auth/01_SignUp.feature:9)
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the signup page............................................passed When User fills the registration form with details from signup properties...passed And User accepts the terms and clicks Create Account........................failed Then User should see a success message or be redirected to the dashboard....skipped

testcase.name: Successfully request a password reset link
